title: Open the landing page and enter the dashboard
description: A new user can understand the product from the landing page and navigate into the dashboard overview.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary entry point to the dashboard
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify an overview section is displayed

title: Open the dashboard from the landing page
description: Verifies that a user can move from the public landing page into the authenticated dashboard entry point.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to enter the dashboard
Verify the dashboard overview is displayed

title: Submit an action for governance review
description: A user can open the governance check workflow, submit an action for review, and see an approval or rejection result with reasoning.

steps.description: Navigate to /governance/check
Fill in a valid action to review
Submit the governance check
Verify a governance decision result is displayed
Verify reasoning or policy references are displayed

title: Enter the product from the landing page
description: Verifies that a visitor can understand the product from the landing page and continue into the main dashboard experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the spend demo section
Verify the landing page presents the product introduction and spend demo
Click the link to enter the dashboard
Verify the dashboard is displayed

title: Enter the dashboard from the landing page
description: This verifies that a user can understand the product from the landing page and continue into the main dashboard experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to enter the dashboard
Verify the dashboard overview is displayed
Verify core dashboard content is visible

title: Browse the agents list and open an agent detail page
description: Verifies that a user can inspect registered agents by moving from the list to an individual agent detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /agents
Select an agent from the list
Verify the agent detail page is displayed
Verify agent status and decision history are displayed

title: View dashboard overview data and navigate to other sections
description: Verifies that the dashboard shows summary information and supports navigation to the main governance sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Scroll through the dashboard overview
Verify agent statistics and spend overview are displayed
Click the navigation link to open agents
Verify the agents list is displayed

title: Browse policies and open a policy detail
description: A compliance user can open the policies area, review the policy list, and inspect a specific policy with its rule history.

steps.description: Navigate to /policies
Click the first available policy in the list
Verify policy details are displayed
Verify policy versions or change history are displayed

title: Browse the agents list and inspect an agent
description: This verifies that a user can open the agents list and drill into an agent detail view for inspection.

steps.description: Navigate to /agents
Open an agent from the list
Verify the agent detail view is displayed
Verify agent configuration or activity details are visible

title: Evaluate a governance action and review the decision
description: This verifies that a user can submit an action to governance check and see the resulting approve or reject reasoning.

steps.description: Navigate to /governance/check
Fill in a valid governance action payload
Submit the governance check
Verify a governance decision is displayed
Verify approval or rejection reasoning is visible

title: Review dashboard overview data
description: This verifies that the dashboard presents a useful overview with fallback or demo data for users who land there first.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify dashboard summary content is displayed
Verify recent activity or overview widgets are visible

title: Open audit trail and inspect evidence for a record
description: A compliance user can open the audit trail, inspect a record, and drill into its evidence and transaction details.

steps.description: Navigate to /audit
Open the first available audit record
Verify transaction details are displayed
Verify evidence hash or linked evidence details are displayed

title: Manage workspace settings and save changes
description: This verifies that a user can update workspace settings and receive confirmation that the changes were saved.

steps.description: Navigate to /settings
Update a workspace setting
Save the changes
Verify a saved confirmation state is displayed
Verify the updated settings remain visible

title: Inspect the audit trail and open related evidence
description: This verifies that a user can review the audit trail and drill into evidence and linked transaction details.

steps.description: Navigate to /audit
Open an audit entry
Expand linked evidence or transaction details
Verify audit evidence details are displayed
Verify linked transaction information is visible

title: Review policy list and browse policy history
description: This verifies that a compliance user can open policies and inspect version history for a policy.

steps.description: Navigate to /policies
Open a policy from the list
View the policy history
Verify policy details are displayed
Verify policy version history is visible

title: Add or edit integration credentials and webhook settings
description: This verifies that a user can manage API keys or webhooks in the integrations area and save the configuration successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /integrate
Create or edit an integration credential
Update the webhook configuration
Save the integration changes
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the refreshed integration configuration is displayed

title: Review the landing page architecture and integration guidance
description: Verifies that a visitor can explore the landing page's explanatory sections and see guidance about how the system connects to other services.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll through the landing page informational sections
Verify product architecture information is displayed
Verify integration guidance is displayed

title: Open a copilot run detail
description: A user can select a copilot run from the list and see its execution timeline on the detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /copilot
Click a copilot run from the list
Verify the run detail view is displayed
Verify an event timeline is displayed

title: Create a new agent in the workshop
description: This verifies that a user can start from the workshop and complete the agent creation or configuration flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /agents/workshop
Fill in the required agent details
Submit the agent configuration
Verify a new agent preview or confirmation is displayed
Verify the workshop shows the created or updated agent state

title: Review a spend demo decision path
description: A user can adjust the spend demo scenario, trigger evaluation, and see the resulting policy decision explanation.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo/spend
Adjust the scenario parameters
Trigger the evaluation
Verify a policy decision outcome is displayed
Verify an explanation of the decision path is displayed

title: Open a CRE run detail
description: A user can select a CRE run from history and see its execution details and timeline.

steps.description: Navigate to /runs
Click a CRE run from the history list
Verify the run detail view is displayed
Verify an execution timeline is displayed

title: Review a run timeline from the runs area
description: This verifies that a user can open a run and inspect its timeline for operational context.

steps.description: Navigate to /runs
Open a run from the list
Verify the run detail view is displayed
Verify the run timeline is visible

title: View the copilot runs list
description: A user can open the copilot runs page and see a list of past workflow runs to inspect.

steps.description: Navigate to /copilot
Verify copilot runs are displayed
Verify past workflow runs are listed

title: View the CRE run history list
description: A user can open the CRE runs page and see historical workflow executions to review.

steps.description: Navigate to /runs
Verify CRE run history is displayed
Verify execution records are listed

title: Connect a web3 wallet successfully
description: This verifies that a user can open a page with wallet context and complete a wallet connection for later web3 actions.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Open the wallet connection flow
Approve the wallet connection
Verify the wallet is shown as connected
Verify connected wallet state is available for web3 actions

title: Enter a command in PromptOS
description: A user can type a command in the PromptOS terminal and see terminal output appear in response.

steps.description: Navigate to /os
Enter a terminal command
Verify terminal output is displayed
Verify the prompt remains interactive

title: Open the PromptOS terminal
description: A user can open the PromptOS terminal page and see an interactive terminal interface ready for commands.

steps.description: Navigate to /os
Verify a terminal interface is displayed
Verify an interactive prompt is available

title: Switch the interface theme
description: This verifies that a user can toggle between visual themes and see the change reflected across the interface.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Toggle the theme control
Verify the interface theme changes
Verify the updated theme is applied across the page

title: Move between core governance sections from the dashboard shell
description: A user can navigate between dashboard-related governance areas and land on the expected section pages.
category: Route transitions between all dashboard sections

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Click the navigation entry for agents
Click the navigation entry for policies
Click the navigation entry for audit
Verify the audit section is displayed
Verify the dashboard shell navigation remains available

title: Use the responsive sidebar on a smaller screen
description: This verifies that the dashboard navigation adapts on a smaller viewport and still allows navigation to another section.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Resize the browser to a smaller viewport
Open the navigation menu
Select a dashboard section
Verify the target section is displayed
Verify the responsive layout remains intact

title: Validate and correct an invalid integration value
description: This verifies that a user sees validation feedback for malformed integration input and can correct it to save successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /integrate
Enter an invalid integration value
Submit the form
Verify a validation error is visible
Correct the invalid value
Save the integration changes
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Correct an invalid governance action and resubmit
description: A user sees validation feedback for an incomplete governance action, then fixes the form and successfully receives a review result.

steps.description: Navigate to /governance/check
Submit the governance check without filling required fields
Verify a validation error is displayed
Fill in a valid action to review
Submit the governance check
Verify a governance decision result is displayed

title: Use the dashboard with fallback data when metrics are missing
description: Verifies that the dashboard remains usable with fallback content and non-blocking missing-data messaging.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Scroll through the dashboard overview
Verify fallback metrics or mock data are displayed
Verify a non-blocking missing-data message is displayed

title: Use the spend demo when fallback data is shown
description: A user can still interact with the spend demo controls and see graceful fallback messaging when live evaluation data is unavailable.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo/spend
Verify fallback or mock data is displayed
Verify a graceful status or availability message is displayed
Adjust the scenario parameters
Verify the demo controls remain interactive

title: Continue browsing the landing page when demo content is unavailable
description: Verifies that the landing page still shows usable fallback content and remains browsable when demo data is missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the spend demo section
Verify a fallback or empty state message is displayed
Verify the landing page hero content remains visible

title: Handle a rejected wallet connection attempt
description: This verifies that a user who rejects the wallet prompt receives a connection error and can remain in the app shell.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Open the wallet connection flow
Reject the wallet connection
Verify a wallet connection error is visible
Verify the app remains usable after the rejected connection

title: Return to copilot after an invalid run lookup
description: A user who reaches an unavailable copilot run detail can recover by returning to the run list.

steps.description: Navigate to /copilot
Open an unavailable run detail from the list or enter an invalid run route through the app's navigation
Verify a not-found or error state is displayed
Verify a way to return to the copilot runs list is available

title: Return to run history after an invalid run lookup
description: A user who opens an unavailable CRE run detail can recover by returning to the history list.

steps.description: Navigate to /runs
Open an unavailable run detail from the list or enter an invalid run route through the app's navigation
Verify a not-found or error state is displayed
Verify a way to return to the CRE run history is available

title: Return to the agents list after an invalid agent lookup
description: Verifies that an invalid or missing agent detail state shows an error or not-found view and allows the user to get back to the agents list.

steps.description: Navigate to /agents
Select an agent that is unavailable in the current view
Verify a not-found or error state is displayed
Click the link to return to the agents list
Verify the agents list is displayed

title: Review an empty or fallback audit state
description: A user can open the audit trail and see a safe empty or fallback state without losing the ability to navigate the app.

steps.description: Navigate to /audit
Verify an empty state or fallback message is displayed
Verify audit navigation remains available

title: Recover from a PromptOS initialization problem
description: A user can see a usable fallback or error state when the PromptOS terminal does not initialize normally.

steps.description: Navigate to /os
Verify a terminal fallback or error state is displayed
Verify the page layout still presents recovery guidance
